arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man City table 'very attractive offers' to Barcelona star as look to pull off shock January move
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City reportedly submit 'very attractive financial offers' to Barcelona attacker Dani Olmo, who is at the centre of a registration issue.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Stuttering Man City travel to seventh-place Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jack Grealish starts against his former side while Jhon Duran pips Ollie Watkins to the starting XI - follow live!

arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed fresh injury blow as defender missing from squad to face Man City
arts.sum: Amadou Onana replaced Carlos in the Villa starting XI for this afternoon’s match, with Ezri Konsa set to play alongside Pau Torres in defence. Unai Emery will give an update on the defender and possibly a timeline regarding his return after Villa’s match with City today.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains decision to drop Kyle Walker and Kevin De Bruyne from Man City team
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has made a host of changes to his Manchester City side for their clash at Aston Villa with Kyle Walker among those to be dropped as the right-back struggles for form

arts.ttl: Aston Villa favourite retires at 33 and immediately confirms new role
arts.sum: Hourihane played regularly under Dean Smith in the first year back in the Premier League as Villa survived on the final day, but his chances became more limited after the signing of Ross Barkley and he was loaned out to Swansea City in January 2021. Hourihane did initially re-sign for Barnsley after bidding farewell to Pride Park, but he made two appearances in August and never again, as he juggled his playing with his coaching duties.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains why key Man City duo dropped vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has dropped Kyle Walker and Kevin de Bruyne from the Man City starting lineup for their Premier League clash with Aston Villa. Both players started in the 2-1 home defeat to Manchester United on Sunday, but have been named on the bench for Saturday’s trip to Villa Park. The Catalan coach explained that […] The post Pep Guardiola explains why key Man City duo dropped vs Aston Villa first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man City's Oscar Bobb reveals potential return date following serious leg injury
arts.sum: Manchester City attacker Oscar Bobb reveals a potential recovery timeline after spending five months out with a leg injury.

arts.sum: Emile Smith Rowe may not be an Arsenal player anymore, but he still has a serious soft spot for the Gunners. Indeed, Smith Rowe found...

arts.ttl: Why Matheus Nunes is not involved for Man City vs Aston Villa as De Bruyne and Walker calls made
arts.sum: Just as Manchester City's injury list looked to be shortening, more players have been added to the treatment room.
